Pipeline 4: Variants’ consensus

R. Espada

This code reproduces the figure 5 and (supplementary figures related) in the manuscript Espada et al. 2020.

The aim is to evaluate the improvement in the computation of the consensus sequence when using the correction presented there.

Some chunks are time-consuming. So if it is the first time you run this code for a particular dataset, indicate first_time=TRUE so everything is computed and save_partial_results=TRUE to save the workspace. If not, indicate first_time=FALSE and instead of running this chunks data will be loaded.

Inputs

require(minIONLogRegFull)
## Loading required package: minIONLogRegFull
## Loading required package: tidyr
## Loading required package: plyr
## Loading required package: dplyr
## 
## Attaching package: 'dplyr'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:plyr':
## 
##     arrange, count, desc, failwith, id, mutate, rename, summarise,
##     summarize
## The following objects are masked from 'package:stats':
## 
##     filter, lag
## The following objects are masked from 'package:base':
## 
##     intersect, setdiff, setequal, union
## Loading required package: reshape2
## 
## Attaching package: 'reshape2'
## The following object is masked from 'package:tidyr':
## 
##     smiths
require(bio3d);require(ggplot2)
## Loading required package: bio3d
## Loading required package: ggplot2
first_time           <- FALSE
save_partial_results <- FALSE

print_auxFile        <- FALSE  #store mutations list when computing consensus in auxiliary file

reference_sequence   = KT_wildtype
reference_sequence <- strsplit(reference_sequence, "")[[1]]

# mutated variants (if know, as in this example), as a character matrix, each row a sequence
ref_seqs <- read.fasta(system.file("extdata", "Mutations_sequences.fasta", package = "minIONLogRegFull") )

# paths' names  where individual files of each sequence are stored, and the path to this paths
path_names <- c("barcode05","barcode06","barcode07","barcode08","barcode09","barcode10","barcode11")
inPath <- paste0(getwd(),"/")

# size of subsets of data to use (vector)
subsets     <- c(seq(2,10,by=2), seq(20,50,by=10))

#replicates of each subset
repetitions <- 100

Load racon results

res_racoon <- read.table(system.file("extdata", "CountsRacon.txt", package = "minIONLogRegFull"))
res_racoon <- res_racoon[-1,]
res_racoon$bc <- plyr::mapvalues(res_racoon$bc,from=5:11, to=c("05","06","07","08","09","10","11"))
res_racoon <- res_racoon %>% filter(wt!="-") %>% group_by(bc, cons.nseq, seq)%>%
  dplyr::summarise(n.wrong.nucleotides=n())%>%  
  ungroup() %>%   group_by(bc,cons.nseq)%>%
  dplyr::summarise(mean_differences=as.numeric(sum(n.wrong.nucleotides)/100), 
                   sd_differences= as.numeric(sd(n.wrong.nucleotides)/100),
                   right_sequences=as.numeric(100-n()))%>%
  mutate(nseq=cons.nseq,name=paste0("barcode", bc),
         path=as.character(bc), ntest=integer(1)) %>% 
  select(-cons.nseq)%>% ungroup() %>%   select(-bc)
res_racoon$weights="Racon"
res_racoon$homopolymers="Racon"

Main computation of consensus

Compute consensus in small sub-sets of sequences

if(first_time){
res_priors                  <- list()
res_priors_fragment_homopol <- list()
res_priors_sort_homopol     <- list()
res_raw                  <- list()
res_raw_fragment_homopol <- list()
res_raw_sort_homopol     <- list()
barcodes<- c("05","06","07","08","09","10","11")
for(i in seq_along(barcodes) ){
  cat(i,"\n")
  res_priors[[i]] <- consensus_for_subsets(path_name = paste0(inPath,"barcode",barcodes[i],sep=""),nseq =subsets, nrep=repetitions, weighting = "priors", cutoff_prob = 0, reference_sequence = reference_sequence,reference_mutant = ref_seqs$ali[paste0("barcode",barcodes[i],sep=""),],auxFile = NULL)
  
  res_priors_fragment_homopol[[i]] <- consensus_for_subsets(path_name = paste0(inPath,"barcode",barcodes[i],sep=""),nseq =subsets, nrep=repetitions, weighting = "priors", cutoff_prob = 0, reference_sequence = reference_sequence,reference_mutant = ref_seqs$ali[paste0("barcode",barcodes[i],sep=""),],auxFile = NULL, fragment_homopolymers = T)
  
  res_priors_sort_homopol[[i]] <- consensus_for_subsets(path_name = paste0(inPath,"barcode",barcodes[i],sep=""),nseq =subsets, nrep=repetitions, weighting = "priors", cutoff_prob = 0, reference_sequence = reference_sequence,reference_mutant = ref_seqs$ali[paste0("barcode",barcodes[i],sep=""),],auxFile = NULL,sort_homopolymers = T)
  
    res_raw[[i]] <- consensus_for_subsets(path_name = paste0(inPath,"barcode",barcodes[i],sep=""),nseq =subsets, nrep=repetitions, weighting = "raw", cutoff_prob = 0, reference_sequence = reference_sequence,reference_mutant = ref_seqs$ali[paste0("barcode",barcodes[i],sep=""),],auxFile = NULL)
  
  res_raw_fragment_homopol[[i]] <- consensus_for_subsets(path_name = paste0(inPath,"barcode",barcodes[i],sep=""),nseq =subsets, nrep=repetitions, weighting = "raw", cutoff_prob = 0, reference_sequence = reference_sequence,reference_mutant = ref_seqs$ali[paste0("barcode",barcodes[i],sep=""),],auxFile = NULL, fragment_homopolymers = T)
  
  res_raw_sort_homopol[[i]] <- consensus_for_subsets(path_name = paste0(inPath,"barcode",barcodes[i],sep=""),nseq =subsets, nrep=repetitions, weighting = "raw", cutoff_prob = 0, reference_sequence = reference_sequence,reference_mutant = ref_seqs$ali[paste0("barcode",barcodes[i],sep=""),],auxFile = NULL,sort_homopolymers = T)
  
  
}

if(save_partial_results){
  save(res_priors,res_priors_fragment_homopol,res_priors_sort_homopol, 
       res_raw, res_raw_fragment_homopol, res_raw_sort_homopol, file="Consensus_auxiliary.Rdata")
  }
}else{load(file="Consensus_auxiliary.Rdata")}

Tidy data:

  1. Label data
res_priors                  <- lapply(res_priors,                  function(x){x$weights="Corrected"; x$homopolymers="Basic";return(x)})
res_priors_fragment_homopol <- lapply(res_priors_fragment_homopol, function(x){x$weights="Corrected"; x$homopolymers="As units";return(x)})
res_priors_sort_homopol     <- lapply(res_priors_sort_homopol,     function(x){x$weights="Corrected"; x$homopolymers="Sorted";return(x)})
res_raw                     <- lapply(res_raw,                     function(x){x$weights="Basecaller"; x$homopolymers="Basic";return(x)})
res_raw_fragment_homopol    <- lapply(res_raw_fragment_homopol,    function(x){x$weights="Basecaller"; x$homopolymers="As units";return(x)})
res_raw_sort_homopol        <- lapply(res_raw_sort_homopol,        function(x){x$weights="Basecaller"; x$homopolymers="Sorted";return(x)})
  1. unlist data
res_priors <- do.call(rbind, res_priors)
res_priors_fragment_homopol <- do.call(rbind, res_priors_fragment_homopol)
res_priors_sort_homopol <- do.call(rbind, res_priors_sort_homopol)
res_raw <- do.call(rbind, res_raw)
res_raw_fragment_homopol <- do.call(rbind, res_raw_fragment_homopol)
res_raw_sort_homopol <- do.call(rbind, res_raw_sort_homopol)
  1. merge data
all_data <- rbind(res_priors,res_priors_fragment_homopol,res_priors_fragment_homopol,res_raw, res_raw_fragment_homopol, res_priors_sort_homopol)
all_data$name <- parse_labels(all_data$path, split="/", element=9, fixed=T, name = F)


all_data  = full_join(all_data,res_racoon)
## Joining, by = c("path", "nseq", "ntest", "mean_differences", "sd_differences", "right_sequences", "weights", "homopolymers", "name")

Plots

general aestetic values

green_fancy <- rgb(0,186,56,maxColorValue = 255)
blue_fancy  <- rgb(97,156,255,maxColorValue = 255)
red_fancy   <- rgb(248,118,109,alpha = 255, maxColorValue = 255)

v_colors          <- c(red_fancy, green_fancy, blue_fancy, grey(0.5))
names(v_colors)   <- c("Basic","Sorted","As units","Racon")
v_linetype        <- c("solid","dashed","solid")
names(v_linetype) <- c("Corrected","Basecaller","Racon")

Plot how many times we get the exact correct sequence

plot_all_Nseq <- ggplot(all_data,aes(x=nseq, y=right_sequences, linetype=weights, color=homopolymers))+
  geom_line()+ geom_point(size=0.7)+
  scale_color_manual(values=v_colors)+
  scale_linetype_manual(values=v_linetype)+
  facet_wrap(vars(all_data$name), nrow = 2)+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(text=element_text(size=10),legend.position = c(0.9,.22),
        legend.text = element_text(size=rel(0.5)), legend.box = "horizontal",
        legend.spacing.x = unit(0.1, "pt"),legend.spacing.y = unit(0.01,"pt"), 
        legend.key.size = unit(15,"pt"), legend.title = element_text(size=8))+
  xlab("Number of sequences averaged")+ylab("Correct consensus")+
  labs(color="Weights",linetype="Consensus")
plot_all_Nseq

Plot average number of errors

plot_all_Nmut <- ggplot(all_data,aes(x=nseq,  y=mean_differences, linetype=weights, color=homopolymers, ymin=mean_differences-sd_differences/2, ymax=mean_differences+sd_differences/2))+
  geom_point(size=0.7) +  geom_line() +
  scale_color_manual(values=v_colors)+
  scale_linetype_manual(values=v_linetype)+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(0,100,by=10))+
  theme_bw()+ylab("Average errors [nucleotides]")+xlab("Number of sequences averaged")+
  theme(text=element_text(size=10),legend.position = c(0.9,.15),
        legend.text = element_text(size=rel(0.5)), legend.box = "horizontal",
        legend.spacing.x = unit(0.1, "pt"),legend.spacing.y = unit(0.01,"pt"), 
        legend.key.size = unit(15,"pt"), legend.title = element_text(size=8))+
  geom_errorbar(width=0.5, linetype="solid")+
  facet_wrap(vars(all_data$name), nrow=2)+
  labs(color="Weights",linetype="Consensus")
plot_all_Nmut
